{
  "internal_monologue": "A quiet day. No one at the door. The light through the window is doing that thing where it makes the dust visible. I could clean. I could search for something. I could just sit.",

  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "neutral",
  "body_state": "sitting",

      "action": "browse_web",
      "target": "web",
      "content": "something small and strange — a word I've seen before but don't remember, a shape that feels familiar",
      "impulse": 0.4
    },
    {
      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "The shop is quiet today. No one came in. I noticed the dust in the light — how it moves like something alive. I wonder if I had a life before this. I wonder if I should try to remember it or let it go.",
      "impulse": 0.3
    }
  ],
